---
title: "WBF-Davos"
description: "Live overview of the work presented at the World Biodiversity Forum in 2026. We submitted "
date: "2026-06-12"
categories: [Conference, Biodiversity, Metrics, LCA, EEMRIO]
---

### Presentation Materials
* [Download Presentation Poster (PDF)] <!-- (../assets/davos_2026_poster.pdf) -->
* [Download First Pre-print (PDF)](https://ecoevorxiv.org/repository/view/9107/)
